title: stale SetResponse doc mentions missing destroy field
description: mod.rs line 62-63: the SetResponse doc says 'destroy is deferred to Phase 4' but the struct already includes the destroyed field (line 77). A reader trusting the doc comment would conclude the field is absent, then be confused when it appears in practice. Fix: remove the stale sentence from the doc comment.
close_reason: fixed: SetResponse doc updated to list all supported operations and drop the stale Phase 4 deferral note
